title: WegoWise Utility Meter
description: JSON Schema for a utility meter record in the WegoWise platform tracking energy or water consumption.

account_number.description: Utility account number for this meter

nickname.description: Optional user-defined nickname for this meter

utility_company_id.description: ID of the utility company providing this service

building_id.description: ID of the building this meter is associated with

apartment_id.description: ID of the apartment this meter is associated with (if applicable)

area_id.description: ID of the commercial area this meter is associated with (if applicable)

last_import_date.description: Date of the most recent automated data import
